Get Quote

Careers at Monterey Bay Door

We're a growing company, and we're always looking for good people who know the door, frame, and hardware trade.

Who we're looking for

It's rare to find people who know this industry. When we do, we make room for them.

Project Managers

You've run commercial door, frame, and hardware scopes — takeoffs, submittals, scheduling with GCs, and keeping a punch list moving. You can own a project from plans to closeout.

Estimators & Detailers

You can read a plan set, build a door schedule, and quote a full opening package — doors, frames, hardware, and trim — without anything falling through the cracks.

Field & Shop Talent

Installers, access control techs, and shop hands who machine doors and prep hardware. If you take pride in a clean opening, we want to talk.

How to apply

No forms. Send us an email and tell us your story.

Email tomrehak@mbdoor.com with:

  • ✓ Who you are and what you've done in the trade
  • ✓ Why you want to work at Monterey Bay Door
  • ✓ A résumé if you have one — experience matters more than formatting

We read every email. If there's a fit, you'll hear from us.

Email Us About a Role

Commercial doors, frames, hardware, & access control specialist serving Central California since 2007. Complete turnkey solutions and in-house locksmithing.
